observations.title: EffectiveProfile.budget / assurance フィールド型がプレースホルダー表記
observations.rationale: 要件1の `budget: <recorded>` / `assurance: <recorded>` は TypeScript 型未確定。R1 では値に基づく挙動がないため `Record<string, unknown>` 等で実装可能だが、R2–R6 で型が固まると変更が発生しうる。

observations.title: schemaVersion 対応上限の定数名・配置が未明示
observations.rationale: 要件4「本 runtime の対応上限以下」の上限値（R1 では 1）を定義する定数の名前・ファイルが指定されていない。pipelineId 側に類例がないため実装者の判断になるが、明示しておくと一貫性が出る。

observations.title: TransitionContext.patch の Omit に profile が含まれない
observations.rationale: pipelineId と同様、コンベンション依存で patch に profile を渡さないことで immutability を保つ設計。受け入れ基準にテストによる固定があるため型レベル強制がなくても許容範囲。

toolResult.reason:
Wrote design.md, spec.md, tasks.md under specrunner/changes/assurance-profile-spine/ for the R1 assurance-profile spine (feature). Plan mirrors the existing pipelineId pattern: EffectiveProfile type + self-consistent STANDARD_PROFILE (policyDigest derived at construction via computePolicyDigest, which hashes all fields EXCEPT policyDigest), JobState.profile?: EffectiveProfile, getProfile/computePolicyDigest helpers, buildInitialJobState default, immutable-per-job (spread preservation + compile-time patch Omit tooth), and fail-closed attach self-consistency verification in verifyCheckpoint (profile-inconsistent / profile-uninterpretable) with absent→standard backward compat.

Key design finding surfaced during verification: the request's literal instruction to compute digests in src/state/profile.ts using hashObject from src/core/agent/hash.ts would create a shared-kernel→domain (B-3) layering divergence (architecture/model.md §3), tripping core-invariants.test.ts. Resolved via D1: relocate the dependency-free canonicalJson/hashObject to src/util/hash.ts (leaf) with a re-export shim at the old path (behavior-preserving, no consumer churn), so state can compute digests without a boundary violation. Also confirmed buildInitialJobState is the sole initial-state factory and that verifyCheckpoint routes through validateJobState, so validateJobState must stay lenient on profile to preserve the correct attach reason codes.

Only the three planning files were written; no source/README edits (PLAN-only, per override). All acceptance criteria are mapped to Requirements/Scenarios (spec.md) and tasks T-01..T-08 with acceptance criteria.
